summary: Hybrid TS extractor built and swapped in. typescript.json now uses TypeDoc (namespaces) + targeted @types regex (Amity globals). typescript-from-typedoc.json deleted. 6 expected @hidden-removal drift items, all already filed as tickets in 0083.

changes.description: Self-contained hybrid extractor. Pass 1: TypeDoc JSON extraction (24 namespaces, @hidden honored natively, signatures captured). Pass 2: Amity global namespace via targeted @types/domains/*.ts regex (same logic as typescript-extractor.py v1.3 extract_amity_namespace). Merge: TypeDoc wins for all 24 namespaces; Amity from Pass 2 added as 25th. merge_notes tracks any collisions (none found).
Swapped to hybrid output. namespaces=25, namespaced_members=1327, amity_global=946, root_exports=176. extractor: typescript-hybrid-extractor.py v0.3.0-hybrid.
Pilot artifact superseded by hybrid output.
TS migration status updated to complete. Hybrid approach documented. Legacy extractors marked DEPRECATED/superseded.

notes: Hybrid stats: 25 namespaces (24 TypeDoc + Amity), 1327 total namespaced members, 946 Amity globals, 176 root exports. Drift gate shows 6 items: Client.getActiveClient (4 files) + PostRepository.deletePost (1 file). These are the expected @hidden-removal items already filed as tickets 0083-01 and 0083-02 in sdk-tickets-to-file.md. Android doc-as-test had unrelated JAR cache miss (non-blocking, pre-existing issue). No merge collisions between TypeDoc and @types passes.
